title: How to copy from host to guest machine
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"64dio","text":"Short instructions on how to allow copying and pasting to the virtual machine. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Click settings on the ECOGEO virtual machine: a
Go to advanced under the general tab: a
Change both Shared Clipboard & Drag'n'Drop to bidirectional then click OK: a
You can now copy and paste between host and guest machines. NOTE: paste in Ubuntu is Shift + Ctrl + V
creator: James E Thornton Jr
